description: This tool can be used to plot IR spectra, Raman spectra, ROA spectra, VCD spectra, UV–Vis spectra, ECD spectra, and NMR spectra.

Starting from SMILES strings, this tool carries out a complete computational-chemistry workflow using atom mapping, force-field optimization, and CINEB calculations; it can obtain an initial transition-state structure from the supplied SMILES.
This tool analyzes user input and automatically generates the keywords and route section for Gaussian jobs.
This tool converts SDF files into Gaussian input files (.gjf).
This tool converts SMILES strings into 3D-coordinate SDF files.
This tool converts XYZ files into Gaussian input files (.gjf).
